ModuleName: Machine Learning, Automation, Version Control, and Responsible AI

Artifacts.Name: Module Topics
Artifacts.Description: Outlines the module's core topics—supervised machine learning concepts, scikit-learn workflows, engineering automation and parameter sweeps, version control, and responsible AI—serving as a navigation guide for learners to understand what will be covered and for instructors to align their teaching materials.

Artifacts.Name: Module Topics (HTML)
Artifacts.Description: A topic outline for the module that lists and briefly introduces each major subject area—supervised machine learning, automation, version control, and responsible AI—giving learners and instructors an overview of what will be covered and how the concepts relate to one another.
